summary: ob_authority_ts is provably equal to ob_primary in all reachable states. Elimination is clean, mechanically correct, and affects zero properties.

equality_proof.detail: Init: both [m in Markets |-> 1] (lines 170, 174). OBViewChange: new_ts = ob_authority_ts[m]+1 (line 430), new_session = ob_primary[m]+1 (line 431). Both assigned in same action (lines 437-438). No other action modifies either. Inductive equality holds trivially.

property_surface.detail: Searched all 19 properties (P1-P19). ob_authority_ts appears only in P1 (TypeInvariant, line 137) which is being updated. No invariant reads ob_authority_ts as a semantic constraint. P6 uses ce_authority_ts (line 893). P16 uses ce_authority_ts (line 971). No property references ob_authority_ts.

downstream_impact.detail: DownstreamOMSReceiveOBViewChange (line 604) reads vc.ts from the view change message. Proposal changes vc.ts from new_ts to new_session. Since new_ts = new_session always, oms_cached_ob_ts receives identical values. Monotonicity guard (vc.ts > oms_cached_ob_ts[p][m], line 609) preserved.

checks: TypeInvariant: ob_authority_ts[m] in Nat removed (line 137). ok, ob_primary[m] in Nat already covered.
Init: ob_authority_ts = [m in Markets |-> 1] removed (line 174). ok.

OBProduceEffect UNCHANGED (line 368): ob_authority_ts removed. ok, but since ob_authority_ts was part of obVars and obVars is NOT in this UNCHANGED clause (individual OB vars listed), removal is correct.
OBProducePendingAction UNCHANGED (line 386): ob_authority_ts removed. ok, same reasoning.
OBCrash UNCHANGED (line 424-425): trailing comma on ob_pending_log removed, ob_authority_ts dropped, closing >> placed. Syntactically correct.
OBViewChange LET (line 430): new_ts binding removed. new_session remains. ok.
OBViewChange body (line 438): ob_authority_ts' assignment removed. ok, variable no longer exists.
OBViewChange VC message (line 448): ts |-> new_ts changed to ts |-> new_session. Semantically identical by equality proof.

residual_risk: None identified. The inductive equality is trivial (same base case, same step, no other modifications). The only external-facing change is the VC message ts field, which carries a provably identical value.
notes: The proposer correctly identified that ce_authority_ts cannot be similarly eliminated due to property surface (P6, P16). This asymmetry is accurate. The proposal is a textbook redundant variable elimination.
